name: Obsidian Universal Hub
author: BxB.ware
description:
Multi-game universal hub built on top of Obsidian UI Library.

Includes:
- Movement: walk speed, jump power, fly, no-clip, infinite jump
- ESP: 2D box/corner/tracer, 3D highlight, team-check, distance
- Misc: UI theme manager, config system, key system integration.
notice:
Do not share your key with others.
Using in competitive or ranked games is at your own risk.
